title: Browse UI: episode detail with body editor
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want to edit episode bodies directly so that captured thoughts can be corrected without writing a follow-up episode.
acceptanceCriteria: - Body in an inline-editable textarea (save calls update_episode_body)
- Extracted entity chips (clickable to navigate to the entity card)
- Extraction status indicator (pending / done / failed; failed shows the error)
Saving triggers Graphiti's bi-temporal re-extraction; the old extracted facts get invalidated
Verify: edit an episode body, save, refresh — the new body is shown and search_brain surfaces re-extracted entities on the next query
